body:
## Summary

Adds two convenient alias commands for the `/solve` command in the hive-telegram-bot:
- `/do` - A shorter, more natural alternative to `/solve`
- `/continue` - Linguistically appropriate in certain contexts (as mentioned in issue #525)

## Changes Made

### `src/telegram-bot.mjs`
- Added `bot.command(/^do$/i, handleSolveCommand)` registration
- Added `bot.command(/^continue$/i, handleSolveCommand)` registration
- Added `do` and `continue` to the text-based fallback command handler (issue #1207)
- Updated `/help` command to document the new aliases
- Updated group-chat-only note to include `/do` and `/continue`

## Usage Examples

All three commands work identically:

```
/solve https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/123 --verbose
/do https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/123 --verbose
/continue https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/123 --verbose
```

## Implementation Notes

- **No breaking changes** - The original `/solve` command works exactly as before
- **DRY principle** - All commands share the same `handleSolveCommand` handler
- **Backward compatible** - Existing users can continue using `/solve`
- **Consistent behavior** - All aliases have identical functionality and error handling
- **Fallback support** - Aliases work with the text-based fallback handler (issue #1207)

## Related Issue

Fixes #525
